welcome.englishOnlyActiveNote: English is available now. More languages are staged next.

choice.configureNewSetupDesc: Start fresh and guide yourself step-by-step through setting up TMDB, OMDB, and your media library folder paths.
choice.importBackupProfileDesc: Load settings instantly from an existing SWAYA settings JSON configuration backup file.

tmdb.requiredToContinueDesc: This is the activation step that unlocks real title matching, posters, backdrops, and cast data.
tmdb.onlyOnce: Only needs to be done once
tmdb.onlyOnceDesc: You need both the TMDB API Key (v3) and the Read Access Token (v4), then SWAYA remembers them.
tmdb.showMe: Show me where to get it

omdb.optionalButRecommendedDesc: A free OMDb API key lets you pull complete IMDb ratings and Rotten Tomatoes scores dynamically.

completion.title: Setup Complete!
completion.description: SWAYA is now configured and ready to organize your media files. Click Finish to save and open your dashboard.

tmdbGuide.scanningLimited: Without TMDB, scanning stays limited to technical file data only.

omdbGuide.ratingsPurposeDesc: SWAYA uses OMDb for IMDb, Metascore, and Rotten Tomatoes ratings during enrichment.
omdbGuide.ratingsMetricsDesc: Ratings provide the metrics displayed on movie details.
